kw.name: Open Connection
kw.doc: Opens a new SSH connection to the given ``host`` and ``port``.

kw.name: Login
kw.msg:
Read output: Welcome to Ubuntu 18.04.6 LTS (GNU/Linux 4.15.0-213-generic x86_64)
* Documentation: https://help.ubuntu.com * Management: https://landscape.canonical.com * Support: https://ubuntu.com/pro
System information as of Mon Apr 6 16:41:30 BST 2026
System load: 0.0 Processes: 183 Usage of /: 42.3% of 15.64GB Users logged in: 0 Memory usage: 54% IP address for ens224: 10.0.0.26 Swap usage: 0%
* Strictly confined Kubernetes makes edge and IoT secure. Learn how MicroK8s just raised the bar for easy, resilient and secure K8s cluster deployment.
https://ubuntu.com/engage/secure-kubernetes-at-the-edge
Expanded Security Maintenance for Infrastructure is not enabled.
0 updates can be applied immediately.
159 additional security updates can be applied with ESM Infra. Learn more about enabling ESM Infra service for Ubuntu 18.04 at https://ubuntu.com/18-04
New release '20.04.6 LTS' available. Run 'do-release-upgrade' to upgrade to it.
Last login: Mon Apr 6 16:39:47 2026 from 10.0.0.152 paul@TRex01:~$
kw.doc: Logs into the SSH server with the given ``username`` and ``password``.

test.name: Verify Python Version

kw.name: Execute Command
kw.doc: Executes ``command`` on the remote machine and returns its outputs.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

test.doc: Verifies Python version on remote TRex server is Python 3.6.9.

test.name: Verify TRex Directory

kw.name: Execute Command
kw.doc: Executes ``command`` on the remote machine and returns its outputs.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

test.doc: Verifies TRex directory exists on remote TRex server.

test.name: Verify TRex Config File

kw.name: Verify TRex Config File Matches Expected
Execute Command
kw.msg:
${actual_text} = ### TRex Dual-Port Configuration ### Using PCI Passthrough Intel 82599ES 10Gb NICs
- port_limit: 2 version: 2 interfaces: - "0000.03:00.0" # Port 0 - "0000.03:00.1" # Port 1
port...
kw.doc: Executes ``command`` on the remote machine and returns its outputs.

kw.name: Get File
kw.msg:
${expected_text} = ### TRex Dual-Port Configuration ### Using PCI Passthrough Intel 82599ES 10Gb NICs
- port_limit: 2 version: 2 interfaces: - "0000.03:00.0" # Port 0 - "0000.03:00.1" # Port 1
port...
kw.doc: Returns the contents of a specified file.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

test.doc: Verifies TRex config file contents on remote TRex server matches expected config.
